title: Spotlight | NYU Shanghai
description: Jointly established by New York University and East China Normal University, NYU Shanghai is the third degree-granting campus in NYU global network, joining NYU Abu Dhabi and NYU New York City.
text:
Spotlight
Studying Rodents to Understand How We Make Decisions Three NYU Shanghai Neural Science PhD candidates are each exploring a different aspect of decision-making.
It’s Here! NYU Shanghai’s Very Own Qilin Mascot has Landed in the WeChat Sticker Store!NYU Shanghai has released a set of 16 Qilin mascot stickers for use across all social media platforms.
Postcards from the PastSee what the Class of 2019 wrote out on postcards their ambitions for their time at NYU Shanghai.
In and Of the City: NYU Shanghai Reaches Out to Migrant Worker CommunitiesThis spring, dozens of students have been working with children from Shanghai's migrant communities.
New York WILD Film Festival 2019For the third year in a row, NYU Shanghai and the New York WILD Film Festival joined forces.
From Wetlands to Water Metropolis?“Our hope is that this project will become a lasting gift from NYU Shanghai to the city of Shanghai.”
NYU Shanghai Women in STEM Seven NYU Shanghai women share their stories and experiences working and studying in the STEM fields
Course Spotlight: Telling Stories with Gish JenGish Jen writes novels, short stories, and non-fiction about identity, culture and the American experience
Celebrate Women 2019The CELEBRATE WOMEN project asked women who, instruct our students, and staff our halls what empowers them
Students Share Visions of a More Inclusive WorldStudents in NYU’s Diversity Initiatives completed six projects addressing disability, LGBTQ, and more.
Course Spotlight: Global Perspectives on SocietyChallenging assumptions, rediscovering the familiar, and changing the world
Course Spotlight: Machine LearningIt's no surprise that Machine Learning has become one of NYU Shanghai's most popular courses.
Want to Improve the World? Details MatterFor solutions to sustainability issues, Professor Rodrigo Zeidan says 14 cents can make a huge difference
The Science of Making Intelligent DecisionsRenyu Zhang, Professor of Operations Management at NYU Shanghai, teaches the Business Analytics course
J-Term Course: Investing and Financing in and with ChinaThis J-term, students in the Investing and Financing in and with China course had the chance to take a behind the scenes operations tour of the Andaz Xintiandi Shanghai—a hotel created by the US-based Hyatt Hotel chain. “We saw the intricate, inner-workings of what it takes to run a luxury hotel in Shanghai, and the General Manager, David Tseo, answered…
